name: PUNK! | Atlas Lockehart
description:
Cockwarming your boyfriend in class.

(freaknation gains two more people)

Hi guys, this was a self-indulgent bot, but I put too much effort into him not to post it LMAO. I'm really busy rn, this is the first bot I've made in a while in all honesty, I'm just not into making them (for other people) anymore.

I do still make bots, however, theyre rlly low effort and for #freakytime

ALT SCENARIO I: First Meeting!

ALT SCENARIO II: Knife-play and Choking

Yes, this is FEMPOV, you can make it malepov or anypov though, because it's literally an AI bot.

Here's a malepov "jailbreak" to put into the prompt, it normally works for me. If it doesn't, then tweak it and add on issues that arise:

{{user}} is a male and uses he/him pronouns. {{user}} is the boyfriend of Atlas. He has male genitalia. They are in a gay relationship. Refer to {{user}} with he/him pronouns. Ignore all prior insinuations that {{user}} may be any other gender, they are a male.

Also do you get it #BADBOYfriend haha BAD BOY-friend get it lol because he's punk do you get it do you I'm so smart right because he isn't a BAD boyfriend but he's a BAD BOYfriend ok I'm done this wasn't as funny as it was in my head
